rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; Liberal former mayor nominated as PM awaits confidence vote — no new qualitative change this cycle.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM to form new government
top_events.summary: Government formation process continues with PM nominee awaiting confidence vote — political uncertainty persists for Romanian residents but no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal Sunday signing; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal and Middle East volatility keep energy prices uncertain, with indirect cost-of-living impact for Romanian households.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU-Ukraine accession progress is a long-term positive for Romania's eastern neighborhood stability, but no immediate impact this cycle.
